description: Lock Early Mechanical Calculators to Pascal-style arithmetic machines rather than logarithmic calculating aids.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to Pascal's 1642 mechanical calculator.
Arithmetic operations are the direct operation scope automated by Pascal-style calculators.
Arithmetic is the operation lineage automated by early mechanical calculators, not a later scaling or instrument dependency.
Geared calculation remains the mechanical lineage for the Pascaline scope.
Instrument-making capability remains relevant to constructing geared calculating devices.
Logarithms should not be restored unless the node is broadened to logarithmic tables, slide rules, or logarithmic calculating aids.
